creator: tomas@engin.se
text:
Same problem with 12.0-RELEASE:

--

Looking up update.FreeBSD.org mirrors... 3 mirrors found.
Fetching metadata signature for 12.0-RELEASE from update4.freebsd.org... done.

Files on mirror (12.0-RELEASE-p6) appear older than what
we are currently running (12.0-RELEASE-p7)!
Cowardly refusing to proceed any further.

--
